places.name: Amarnath
places.modernInfo: Natural ice Shivalinga forms every year. 4500m altitude. 3-5 lakh pilgrims annually. Open July–August only.

scenes.title: Shiva reveals the secret of immortality
scenes.description: At Amarnath, Shiva revealed the secret of immortality (Amar Katha) to Parvati. He first sent away his vehicle Nandi, his snake Vasuki, Ganesh — so only Parvati heard. But two doves also heard — they became immortal and still live in the cave.

scenes.title: The self-forming ice Shivalinga
scenes.description: Every year, without any human action, an ice linga forms naturally in the cave as the moon waxes, and melts as it wanes. It reaches its full size on Shravan Purnima — Raksha Bandhan day.

places.name: Mount Kailash
places.modernInfo: Never climbed — the only major peak never summited by mountaineers. Four great rivers originate here: Indus, Sutlej, Brahmaputra, Karnali. 52km parikrama circuit.

scenes.title: Shiva meditates eternally
scenes.description: Shiva sits in eternal meditation atop Kailash — the cosmic mountain at the centre of the universe. The Linga Purana says Kailash is the physical form of the cosmic Shivalinga itself.
